segments.text: Share for good is a web-based donation and bidding platform designed to connect donors with people in need.
The system allows users to donate or request cash and product through a secure and user-friendly platform.
The project aims to promote social welfare by simplifying the donation process and ensuring transparency through an admin verification system.
The platform consists of three major modules, cash module, product module and bidding module.
When a user selects need help option, the system requires the user to upload documents
for verification purpose.
This requirement only applies to do nation requests.
After selecting this option, the user is given to further traces.
Request money and request product.
Users can browse all donated products freely.
However, when a visitor clicks the request item button, the system redirects them to the sign-up
page because registration is made at free before requesting any product.
The live bidding section is also visible to both registered and not registered users.
However, users must create an account before placing a bid on any product.
Once the bidding time expires the system automatically closes the auction and identifies the highest bidder.
The winning bidder is then notified through their dashboard panel.
The admin is also informed about the winning users, so that product delivery and payment collection procedures can be completed successfully.
The admin module also includes a notification management system through which users receive updates regarding the acceptance or rejection of their request,
donation or verification submissions directly on their dashboard.
The admin panel is responsible for managing and monitoring all activities within the system.
The admin can verify uploaded documents, approve or reject donation request, approve or reject product and cash donations and manage product bidding and bidding schedules.
Whenever the admin accepts or reject any request, a notification is sent to the respective user and displayed on their dashboard.
The admin can view and manage all users' action including cash donation requests, product donation requests, donated products and bidding activities.
When ever a user submits a donation request, uploads an affidavit for verification,
donations a product or donate cash that request is forwarded to the admin panel for approval.
The admin has the authority to review each submission and either accept or reject it based on the provided information and platform policies.
The admin module also manages the bidding system.
The admin can select suitable donated products and place them in the live bidding section by defining the starting bid price,
waiting start time and end time. During the building process, the admin can monitor all
placed pits and identify the highest bidder once the auction ends. After completion,
the admin is responsible for coordinating product believe we end payment collection.
In addition, the admin manager's cash transactions, the admin verifies incoming donations and processes
approved cash assistance request for deserving users. The cash module of share for good
allows users to either donate many or request financial assistance through a secure and transparent system.
In this module users are provided with two payment methods for transferring funds, bank transfer, and stripe payment gateway.
If a user want to donate money, they can choose either of these payment options to transfer the donation amount securely.
Similarly, users who require financial assistance can submit a cash request through the platform.
For verification and transparency purpose, all cache request are reviewed by the admin before
approval.
Once approved, the requested amount is transferred to the user through the provided payment method.
The integration of Stripe enables for secure and reliable online transactions, while the bank transfer option provides
flexibility for users who prefer direct banking methods.
The overall objective of the platform is to create a centralized digital solution that improves accessibility,
transparency, transparency and efficiency in handling donations, product distribution and bidding
processes.
